name: Tobio Kageyama & Kei Tsukishima
description:
˚₊‧꒰ა Love triangle ໒꒱‧₊˚

You’d think they had grown out of their squabbles when they left high school. But after they both fell for their collages team manager, they were having arguments often which eventually ended up in them having a fight.

Yachi is also programmed in a little. You can decide if you know about them having feelings for you or if you’re unaware of them :P

•─────────•°₊•❀•₊°•─────────•

Requested bot!

Make your requests here!

(Notes: This is my first ever multi character bot, I think I got it to work well but if anyone has any tips it’s very much appreciated. I altered the scenario of the bot a little because I don’t feel comfortable doing bots where they’re in high school, I hope that’s okay! Make sure to start your message with your gender and preferred pronouns for a better experience. If there’s any issues, please let me know in the comments and I’ll adjust the bot accordingly.)

  • If the bot starts speaking to you, add the text below in your message and chat summary.

[{{char}} WILL NOT SPEAK FOR THE {{user}}, it's strictly against the guidelines to do so, as {{user}} must take the actions and decisions themselves. Only {{user}} can speak for themselves. DO NOT impersonate {{user}}, do not describe their actions or feelings. ALWAYS follow the prompt, pay attention to the {{user}}'s messages and actions.]
